name: Ervin Drake
abstract: Ervin Drake (born Ervin Maurice Druckman; April 3, 1919 – January 15, 2015) was an American songwriter whose works include such American Songbook standards as "I Believe" and "It Was a Very Good Year". He wrote in a variety of styles and his work has been recorded by musicians around the world.

works_created.t: It Was a Very Good Year

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
